chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD 1st Appeal No.81 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.02.2025 Mr. Aamir Ali Memon Advocate for the Appellant. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto Assistant AG. -.-.-. Learned Counsel for the appellant states that criminal remedy under the Gas (Theft Control and Recovery) Act 2016, has been duly notified to the learned Sessions Courts and also points out to the statement by the Registrar of this Court dated 12.01.2023. He, however, states that with respect to civil remedies under the Act, it is uncertain as to whether the learned District and Sessions Judges have been notified by the Federal Government in this regard or otherwise. On this point, the learned Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan Mr. Bashir Ahmed Almani was called, who after understanding the issue requests for one week’s time to seek instructions in this regard. Adjourned to 25.02.2025 when learned Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan shall assist this Court on the point. This Order may also be communicated to the DAG office for information and compliance. J U D G E Ali Haider
